title: Reuben's Mob Removal
description: A data-pack made for me and my friends, removing certain mobs from the game.
body: **Reuben’s Mob Removal** effectively removes a big chunk of the games hostile mobs, including all Zombie and Skeleton variants, as well as Evokers and Witches. The pack also comes with an additional function which can be edited to remove optional mobs, like Ghasts.
